Description: Task timing/protocol table used for plot event overlays and protocol documentation.

participant_scope.Description: Participant/session scope where the row applies.

onset.Description: Event/segment onset in seconds from task start.

duration.Description: Segment duration in seconds. 'n/a' indicates boundary-only event with no fixed end in code.

gas.Description: Gas condition if applicable (Air, CO2, Carbogen, Off).

flow_lpm.Description: Flow rate in liters/minute when specified by protocol.

source.Description: Primary source of the protocol definition.
